title: AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetalsFactor
description: AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetalsFactor: Single value indicator for Abiotic Depletion of Minerals and Metals, measured in Antimony (Sb), refers to the over-extraction of non-renewable materials which can lead to the exhaustion of natural (non-fossil) resources.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetalsPerQuantity measured in [kg Sb eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
